assumptions: The intragroup dividend has resulted in a recognised receivable/payable within the group.
The receivable is a monetary item denominated in a currency relevant to foreign exchange risk.
The question concerns the consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 hedge accounting, including when foreign currency risk on intragroup monetary items may qualify as a hedged item in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Foreign currency translation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IAS 21 accounting for exchange differences on intragroup monetary assets or liabilities in consolidated financial statements.
